scripts.predev: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{const r=execSync('netstat -ano | findstr :3000 | findstr LISTENING',{encoding:'utf8'});const m=r.match(/(\d+)\s*$/m);if(m)execSync('taskkill /F /PID '+m[1],{stdio:'ignore'})}catch(e){}try{const r=execSync('netstat -ano | findstr :8000 | findstr LISTENING',{encoding:'utf8'});const m=r.match(/(\d+)\s*$/m);if(m)execSync('taskkill /F /PID '+m[1],{stdio:'ignore'})}catch(e){}"
